rationale.root_cause: The response incorrectly identifies the root cause as the modification of e->v.i in place, but the actual issue is the missing unaryexp call in the default case of code_not.
rationale.local_fix: The suggested local fix does not match the developer patch, which involves adding a unaryexp call in the default case of code_not.
rationale.global_fix: The response does not correctly explain the underlying cause of the bug, which is the missing call to unaryexp in the default case of code_not.
